description: Clean the municipal payroll data in /home/ga/Documents/chicago_employees.xlsx. Extract the last name and first name from the employee list into new columns 'Last_Name' and 'First_Name', ensuring all names are trimmed of leading and trailing spaces. Create a 'Clean_Title' column by converting job titles to proper case. Add a 'Total_Compensation' column that normalizes pay: use the annual salary for salaried employees, and calculate annual pay for hourly employees by multiplying the hourly rate by typical hours and 52 weeks. Create a new sheet named 'Department_Summary' containing a table with headers 'Department', 'Headcount', and 'Avg_Compensation' for the following departments: POLICE, FIRE, STREETS & SAN, WATER MGMNT, and AVIATION. Save the updated spreadsheet to /home/ga/Documents/chicago_employees.xlsx.
